fixed.title: MEDIUM-5 / LOW: GetStreamEventPayload (and JitsiEventPayload, same defect) mixed explicit `extra` field with extra="allow"; explicit field removed, extra="allow" is the single mechanism
MEDIUM-1 / LOW: IANA time zone validator implemented (TimeZoneName via zoneinfo.ZoneInfo AfterValidator) on UserInfo.time_zone and BookingParticipant.time_zone; CLAUDE.md claim is now true

LOW-2: UUID-format validation (UuidStr, str on the wire) on volunteer_id/client_id (BookingCreatedPayload, optional), client_id (BookingReminderSentPayload, optional), user_id (UserEmailChangeRequestedPayload), new_client_user_id (BookingClientReassignedPayload); producers verified read-only: event-admin sends real event-users UUIDs, cal.com webhooks never carry volunteer_id/client_id

LOW-1 test gaps: contract completeness (every EventType has payload model + priority + schema version, no orphan map entries) and wire-format fidelity (every model's documented example round-trips through the canonical {original, normalized} envelope JSON) + validator tests; suite now 73 tests

skipped.title: EnvelopeParticipant.time_zone/user_id left as lenient str | None
skipped.reason: consumer-side envelope parsing must tolerate in-flight legacy messages; strictness belongs on producer-validated payload models

notes: uv run pytest: 73 passed; uv run ruff check . + ruff format --check: clean. AUDIT.md MEDIUM-1, MEDIUM-5, LOW-1, LOW-2 marked resolved (audit-v2 2026-06-11). API_CONTRACTS.md and CLAUDE.md updated for changed sections.
